markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review GrowthX's draft content strategy and align on next steps.](https://fathom.video/share/LuxR4wc82DHmPNFZSxWTsBsWxs2VWHZ9?tab=summary&timestamp=66.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX proposed a 6-cluster content strategy to build authority and drive non-branded traffic, addressing Fieldguide's current blog performance (13 visitors/mo).](https://fathom.video/share/LuxR4wc82DHmPNFZSxWTsBsWxs2VWHZ9?tab=summary&timestamp=229.0)
  - [The strategy maps clusters to Fieldguide's solutions, enabling organic internal linking and a clear user path to product pages.](https://fathom.video/share/LuxR4wc82DHmPNFZSxWTsBsWxs2VWHZ9?tab=summary&timestamp=606.0)
  - [GrowthX recommends prioritizing two clusters: "AI-powered audit automation" (core differentiator) and "Software comparisons" (high-intent, fast-ranking content).](https://fathom.video/share/LuxR4wc82DHmPNFZSxWTsBsWxs2VWHZ9?tab=summary&timestamp=1342.0)
  - [A key tactic—direct competitor comparisons—requires internal buy-in; GrowthX will provide data proving its effectiveness for AI search visibility.](https://fathom.video/share/LuxR4wc82DHmPNFZSxWTsBsWxs2VWHZ9?tab=summary&timestamp=1025.0)

## Topics

### Current State & Goals

  - [**Problem:** Fieldguide's blog has minimal organic traffic (13 visitors/mo) and lacks a scalable content engine.](https://fathom.video/share/LuxR4wc82DHmPNFZSxWTsBsWxs2VWHZ9?tab=summary&timestamp=260.0)
  - [**Goals:**](https://fathom.video/share/LuxR4wc82DHmPNFZSxWTsBsWxs2VWHZ9?tab=summary&timestamp=229.0)
      - [Establish visibility in AI tools (ChatGPT, Perplexity).](https://fathom.video/share/LuxR4wc82DHmPNFZSxWTsBsWxs2VWHZ9?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
      - [Build non-branded organic traffic to reduce paid ad spend.](https://fathom.video/share/LuxR4wc82DHmPNFZSxWTsBsWxs2VWHZ9?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
      - [Create a scalable publishing engine (5 blogs/week).](https://fathom.video/share/LuxR4wc82DHmPNFZSxWTsBsWxs2VWHZ9?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)

### Proposed Content Strategy

  - [**Approach:** Use topic clusters to build authority efficiently, avoiding a "spray and pray" method.](https://fathom.video/share/LuxR4wc82DHmPNFZSxWTsBsWxs2VWHZ9?tab=summary&timestamp=545.0)
  - [**Rationale:** Mapping clusters to solutions creates a natural internal linking structure and a clear user path to product pages.](https://fathom.video/share/LuxR4wc82DHmPNFZSxWTsBsWxs2VWHZ9?tab=summary&timestamp=606.0)
  - [**6 Proposed Clusters:**](https://fathom.video/share/LuxR4wc82DHmPNFZSxWTsBsWxs2VWHZ9?tab=summary&timestamp=681.0)
    1.  [**AI-powered audit automation:** High-level AI topics + commercial keywords (e.g., "Onspring vs. Audit Board vs. Fieldguide").](https://fathom.video/share/LuxR4wc82DHmPNFZSxWTsBsWxs2VWHZ9?tab=summary&timestamp=681.0)
    2.  [**SOC audits:** Maps to SOC audits & readiness solutions.](https://fathom.video/share/LuxR4wc82DHmPNFZSxWTsBsWxs2VWHZ9?tab=summary&timestamp=755.0)
    3.  [**Cybersecurity & privacy compliance:** Maps to IT audit & cybersecurity solutions.](https://fathom.video/share/LuxR4wc82DHmPNFZSxWTsBsWxs2VWHZ9?tab=summary&timestamp=787.0)
    4.  [**Financial audits & SOC compliance:** High-volume keywords (\>100k searches/mo); positions Fieldguide as essential tech.](https://fathom.video/share/LuxR4wc82DHmPNFZSxWTsBsWxs2VWHZ9?tab=summary&timestamp=812.0)
    5.  [**Risk advisory & internal audit:** Maps to risk advisory & internal audit solutions.](https://fathom.video/share/LuxR4wc82DHmPNFZSxWTsBsWxs2VWHZ9?tab=summary&timestamp=872.0)
    6.  [**Software comparisons & buying guides:** Focused on tool evaluations (e.g., "best SOC 2 audit software").](https://fathom.video/share/LuxR4wc82DHmPNFZSxWTsBsWxs2VWHZ9?tab=summary&timestamp=921.0)

### Recommended Priority Clusters

  - **\#1: AI-powered audit automation** → Highlights Fieldguide's core differentiator.
  - **\#6: Software comparisons & buying guides** → Drives immediate rankings and AI visibility.
  - [**Requirement:** This cluster requires a "Product Feature Matrix" artifact from Fieldguide detailing differentiators vs. competitors.](https://fathom.video/share/LuxR4wc82DHmPNFZSxWTsBsWxs2VWHZ9?tab=summary&timestamp=1375.0)

### Content Workflow & Assets

  - [**Process:** GrowthX uses its Atlas platform (AI + human-in-the-loop) for drafting, then sends Google Docs to Fieldguide for review.](https://fathom.video/share/LuxR4wc82DHmPNFZSxWTsBsWxs2VWHZ9?tab=summary&timestamp=1218.0)
  - [**Publishing:** GrowthX will publish approved articles directly to Fieldguide's HubSpot CMS.](https://fathom.video/share/LuxR4wc82DHmPNFZSxWTsBsWxs2VWHZ9?tab=summary&timestamp=1332.0)
  - [**Featured Images:** GrowthX can auto-generate abstract images using AI; requires access to Fieldguide's brand assets (fonts, colors).](https://fathom.video/share/LuxR4wc82DHmPNFZSxWTsBsWxs2VWHZ9?tab=summary&timestamp=1939.0)
  - [**Future Tactic:** Add inline CTAs to blog posts to capture user intent and drive traffic to solutions pages.](https://fathom.video/share/LuxR4wc82DHmPNFZSxWTsBsWxs2VWHZ9?tab=summary&timestamp=2081.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Fieldguide:**](https://fathom.video/share/LuxR4wc82DHmPNFZSxWTsBsWxs2VWHZ9?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)
      - [Review the strategy internally (with Dee, Michelle, Mark).](https://fathom.video/share/LuxR4wc82DHmPNFZSxWTsBsWxs2VWHZ9?tab=summary&timestamp=1183.0)
      - [Provide feedback on cluster priorities and key pain points.](https://fathom.video/share/LuxR4wc82DHmPNFZSxWTsBsWxs2VWHZ9?tab=summary&timestamp=1121.0)
      - [Grant Aida (`aida@growthxlabs.com`) access to Notion and Guru.](https://fathom.video/share/LuxR4wc82DHmPNFZSxWTsBsWxs2VWHZ9?tab=summary&timestamp=1733.0)
      - [Share brand assets (Figma, Canva) for image generation.](https://fathom.video/share/LuxR4wc82DHmPNFZSxWTsBsWxs2VWHZ9?tab=summary&timestamp=1939.0)
  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/LuxR4wc82DHmPNFZSxWTsBsWxs2VWHZ9?tab=summary&timestamp=1596.0)
      - [Create a Notion doc explaining the value of competitor comparison content.](https://fathom.video/share/LuxR4wc82DHmPNFZSxWTsBsWxs2VWHZ9?tab=summary&timestamp=1596.0)
      - [Deliver a content calendar with \~50 topic ideas for review by next Wednesday.](https://fathom.video/share/LuxR4wc82DHmPNFZSxWTsBsWxs2VWHZ9?tab=summary&timestamp=2229.0)
